title: ChillCraft Adventures
body:
**ChillCraft Adventures!**

*ChillCraft Adventures* offers a delightful twist to your Minecraft journey. Dive into a world brimming with towering mountains, sprawling oceans, desert pyramids, and hidden jungle forts. Every nook and cranny of Minecraft's vast terrain is magnified with our thoughtfully selected additions.

Whether you're an intrepid explorer, a visionary builder, or simply yearning for serenity in a breathtaking world, this modpack caters to all tastes.

*ChillCraft Adventures* can operate exclusively on the server side, ensuring seamless compatibility for all your vanilla friends to join without any hiccups. So, gather your crew and embark on an unforgettable adventure in this enchanting realm!

**Features:**
- Overhauled Terrain
- Nether and End Terrain Re-work
- Overhauled Structures
- Brand new structures
- QOL Features
- Optimization

**WARNING:**
ChillCraft Adventures CAN be used on Vanilla Servers, however, the client side mods on this pack might get you banned. It is highly recommended that you ONLY use this modpack with itself. I will not be held responsible for you getting banned if you ignore my advice.

I recommend downloading the server version of this modpack if you want to play with friends. The server version is simply a stripped-down version of the main download. It is completely Vanilla friendly, non-modded clients should have no issues joining.
